title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 8.590
text:
*8.590.  Resolution of board of public buildings required for issuance of bonds. — Bonds may be issued pursuant to the provisions of sections 8.580 to 8.598 pursuant to a resolution adopted by the affirmative vote of two-thirds of the members of the board of public buildings and no other proceedings shall be required therefor.
(L. 2002 S.B. 1191) 
Effective 6-07-02 
*Section terminates upon satisfaction of all outstanding notes and obligations.  See section 8.589.
